source.method: Codex: peak cumulative snapshot per session; Claude/Qwen/Gemini: sum per-turn deltas
source.billing_note: Estimated with public per-token prices. Subscription billing (ChatGPT/Codex/Claude/Gemini plans) and rate limits may differ.
source.privacy_note: Public aggregate snapshot. Local paths, raw prompts, transcripts, session ids, and secrets are not published.

codex.method: Codex session_meta subagent source, response_item function_call names, and MCP/tool names where available. Raw prompts, arguments, and outputs are not exported.
